hadith_entries.text:
956. Narrated Ibn Omar may Allah be pleased with them;
'The Prophet said: 'Whoever keeps a (pet) dog which is
neither a watch dog nor a hunting dog, will get a daily
deduction of two Qirats from his good deeds." (Bukhari).
:said ﷺ Narrated Abu-Huraira ; 'Allah's Messenger .957
"Whoever keeps a dog, one Qirat of the reward of his good
deeds is deducted daily, unless the dog is used for guarding a
farm or cattle." (Bukhari).
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)
